inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Direct material cost per kilogram of the primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.

businessContext_i18n.en: Direct material cost per kilogram of the primary ingredient, sourced from supplier contracts or market index.

inputs.label: Recipe Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of usable output after processing losses (e.g., evaporation, trimming). Based on historical process data.

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Fully burdened labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fully burdened labor cost per operator hour, including wages, benefits, and overhead.

inputs.label: Batch Size (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total input weight of the recipe batch before processing.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total input weight of the recipe batch before processing.

inputs.label: Processing Time (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Total cycle time from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cycle time from start to finish for one batch, including mixing, heating, cooling, and packaging.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Average cost of electricity or thermal energy per kilowatt-hour, based on utility rates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average cost of electricity or thermal energy per kilowatt-hour, based on utility rates.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Total energy used per batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy used per batch, measured by submeters or equipment nameplate ratings.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a percentage of direct labor and material costs, following standard cost accounting.

businessContext_i18n.en: Allocated manufacturing overhead as a percentage of direct labor and material costs, following standard cost accounting.

inputs.label: Waste Disposal Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of non-recyclable waste per kilogram, including landfill fees or incineration.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost to dispose of non-recyclable waste per kilogram, including landfill fees or incineration.

inputs.label: Quality Rework Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of batches requiring rework due to quality deviations, tracked via Six Sigma metrics.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of batches requiring rework due to quality deviations, tracked via Six Sigma metrics.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: ISO 4217 currency code for cost reporting. All input costs are assumed in this currency.

businessContext_i18n.en: ISO 4217 currency code for cost reporting. All input costs are assumed in this currency.

inputs.label: Include Environmental Cost
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include estimated carbon tax or environmental compliance costs in the total cost.

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include estimated carbon tax or environmental compliance costs in the total cost.

rules.message: Recipe yield is below 50% – check process efficiency and material losses.
Quality rework rate exceeds 10% – investigate root cause and implement corrective actions.
Batch size must be greater than zero.

thresholds.message: Total cost per kg exceeds $50 – review material sourcing and process efficiency.
Yield below 80% – immediate process review required.

formulas.label: Total Material Cost
formulas.description: Total direct material cost for the batch.

formulas.label: Total Labor Cost
formulas.description: Direct labor cost for the batch based on processing time.

formulas.label: Total Waste Disposal Cost
formulas.description: Cost to dispose of waste generated from the batch.

formulas.label: Total Rework Cost
formulas.description: Additional cost due to quality rework, estimated as a percentage of material and labor.

formulas.label: Total Overhead Cost
formulas.description: Allocated manufacturing overhead based on direct costs.

formulas.label: Total Cost per kg (Primary Result)
formulas.description: Primary result: total cost per kilogram of usable output.

primary.label: Total Cost per kg
primary.description: Fully loaded cost per kilogram of finished product, including material, labor, energy, waste, rework, and overhead.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Yield Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost impact of material lost due to yield less than 100%.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Rework Loss
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Cost impact of quality rework on total cost per kg.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Energy Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Excess energy cost compared to a benchmark of 0.10 USD/kWh.

suggestedActions.label: Improve Recipe Yield
suggestedActions.description: Target yield improvement to 98% through process optimization (e.g., reduce evaporation, trim losses). Estimated savings: X USD/kg.

suggestedActions.label: Reduce Quality Rework
suggestedActions.description: Implement SPC and root cause analysis to lower rework rate below 1%. Estimated savings: Y USD/kg.

suggestedActions.label: Conduct Energy Audit
suggestedActions.description: Audit energy consumption to identify savings opportunities (e.g., insulation, efficient motors). Estimated savings: Z USD/kg.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Total Cost per kg (Confidence Adjusted)
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Primary result adjusted by a confidence factor based on data quality (e.g., 0.9 for estimated inputs, 1.0 for measured).
